subject: Cannot log in to the patient portal — password reset link expired
description:
Hello,

I've been unable to sign in to the Chesapeake Lung & Sleep patient portal since yesterday. I requested a password reset twice but by the time I open the email the link says it has expired. Could you send a fresh link or reset it on your end?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Course video will not load — climate policy module 4
description:
Hi,

On the Cornerstone Learning platform, the video for Module 4 of "The History of Climate Policy" spins and never plays. Other modules play fine. I've tried Safari and Chrome on my desktop and my iPhone. Is there a known issue?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Refill request stuck as pending on pharmacy portal
description:
Hello,

I submitted a prescription refill through the CVS pharmacy portal three days ago and it still shows "pending" with no pickup time. The store phone line has been busy. Can you check the status of the request on my account?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Document upload failing on insurance portal
description:
Hi,

I'm trying to upload a PDF to my GEHA member portal for a claim and the upload bar reaches 100% then returns an error asking me to try again. The file is a 2 MB PDF. Is there a size limit or a browser you recommend?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Portal not recognizing my date of birth at registration
description:
Hello,

I'm setting up online access to the Annapolis Rheumatology Associates portal for the first time. When I enter my date of birth it says it doesn't match your records, though it's correct. Could you verify the details on my account and help me finish registration?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Appointment confirmation email never arrived
description:
Hi,

I booked a follow-up through the Bay Area Internal Medicine portal but never received the confirmation email, and I don't see the appointment listed under my visits. My email is juan.hernandez@outlook.com. Can you confirm the booking went through?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Course certificate of completion not generating
description:
Hello,

I finished all modules of the climate policy course on Cornerstone Learning, but the certificate page shows the course as 95% complete and won't issue the certificate. I'd like a copy for my records. Can you look into it?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Two-factor code not being sent to my phone
description:
Hi,

The insurance member portal keeps asking for a verification code, but the text never reaches my phone at +16178343967. I've confirmed the number on file is correct. Could you resend it or offer email verification instead?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Vision exam appointment request — no available slots showing
description:
Hello,

I'm trying to request a vision exam through the Chesapeake Eye Associates portal, but the calendar shows no open slots for the next several months. Is the online scheduler up to date, or should I request a specific date another way?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Auto insurance renewal document won't download
description:
Hi,

I'm logged in to my USAA account and trying to download the auto policy renewal PDF, but the download link opens a blank page. I've tried on my iMac and my phone. Could you email me the document or point me to the right link?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Refill portal showing wrong pharmacy location
description:
Hello,

The CVS refill portal has defaulted my pickup location to a store across town rather than the one near me in West Annapolis. I can't seem to change the default in my account settings. Can you update the preferred store?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Course platform logged me out mid-quiz and lost my answers
description:
Hi,

While taking the review quiz on the Cornerstone Learning course, the site logged me out partway through and my answers weren't saved. When I logged back in it wanted me to restart. Is there a way to recover the session?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Cannot view test results in patient portal
description:
Hello,

My Chesapeake Lung & Sleep portal shows a results notification, but when I click through it says the page is unavailable. I've cleared my browser cache and it still won't open. Could you check whether the document is attached on your side?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

On the Cornerstone Learning platform, the video for Module 4 of "The History of Climate Policy" spins and never plays. Other modules play fine. I've tried Safari and Chrome on my desktop and my iPhone. Is there a known issue?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Refill request stuck as pending on pharmacy portal
description:
Hello,

I submitted a prescription refill through the CVS pharmacy portal three days ago and it still shows "pending" with no pickup time. The store phone line has been busy. Can you check the status of the request on my account?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Document upload failing on insurance portal
description:
Hi,

I'm trying to upload a PDF to my GEHA member portal for a claim and the upload bar reaches 100% then returns an error asking me to try again. The file is a 2 MB PDF. Is there a size limit or a browser you recommend?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Portal not recognizing my date of birth at registration
description:
Hello,

I'm setting up online access to the Annapolis Rheumatology Associates portal for the first time. When I enter my date of birth it says it doesn't match your records, though it's correct. Could you verify the details on my account and help me finish registration?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Appointment confirmation email never arrived
description:
Hi,

I booked a follow-up through the Bay Area Internal Medicine portal but never received the confirmation email, and I don't see the appointment listed under my visits. My email is juan.hernandez@outlook.com. Can you confirm the booking went through?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Course certificate of completion not generating
description:
Hello,

I finished all modules of the climate policy course on Cornerstone Learning, but the certificate page shows the course as 95% complete and won't issue the certificate. I'd like a copy for my records. Can you look into it?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Two-factor code not being sent to my phone
description:
Hi,

The insurance member portal keeps asking for a verification code, but the text never reaches my phone at +16178343967. I've confirmed the number on file is correct. Could you resend it or offer email verification instead?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Vision exam appointment request — no available slots showing
description:
Hello,

I'm trying to request a vision exam through the Chesapeake Eye Associates portal, but the calendar shows no open slots for the next several months. Is the online scheduler up to date, or should I request a specific date another way?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Auto insurance renewal document won't download
description:
Hi,

I'm logged in to my USAA account and trying to download the auto policy renewal PDF, but the download link opens a blank page. I've tried on my iMac and my phone. Could you email me the document or point me to the right link?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Refill portal showing wrong pharmacy location
description:
Hello,

The CVS refill portal has defaulted my pickup location to a store across town rather than the one near me in West Annapolis. I can't seem to change the default in my account settings. Can you update the preferred store?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Course platform logged me out mid-quiz and lost my answers
description:
Hi,

While taking the review quiz on the Cornerstone Learning course, the site logged me out partway through and my answers weren't saved. When I logged back in it wanted me to restart. Is there a way to recover the session?

Best,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Cannot view test results in patient portal
description:
Hello,

My Chesapeake Lung & Sleep portal shows a results notification, but when I click through it says the page is unavailable. I've cleared my browser cache and it still won't open. Could you check whether the document is attached on your side?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Update mailing address on member portal
description:
Hi,

I need to confirm my mailing address is current on the GEHA portal — 327 Munroe Court, Annapolis, MD 21401 — but the edit form won't save the change and returns to the old value. Can you update it for me?

Regards,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Cannot log in to the patient portal — password reset link expired
description:
Hello,

I've been unable to sign in to the Chesapeake Lung & Sleep patient portal since yesterday. I requested a password reset twice but by the time I open the email the link says it has expired. Could you send a fresh link or reset it on your end?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez
